completion_promises.criterion_text: New module `guardkit/templates/resolver.py` exposes `resolve_template_source_dir(template_name: str) -> Optional[Path]` with identical behaviour to the current private function.
completion_promises.evidence: Created guardkit/templates/__init__.py and guardkit/templates/resolver.py. The resolve_template_source_dir function has the same signature (template_name: str) -> Optional[Path] and identical behaviour: checks package-installed templates via _get_templates_base_dir() first, falls back to user templates via _get_user_templates_dir(). Verified by 4 unit tests in TestResolveTemplateSourceDir and 2 backward-compatibility tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: `guardkit/cli/init.py` imports from the new module; existing call sites inside `init.py` route through the new public name.
completion_promises.evidence: init.py now imports _get_templates_base_dir, _get_user_templates_dir, and resolve_template_source_dir from guardkit.templates.resolver. The old private function definitions are removed. _resolve_template_source_dir is kept as a thin wrapper that calls the module-level imported helpers, ensuring all internal call sites (apply_template, _resolve_extends_chain, etc.) route through the new module's logic. The public name resolve_template_source_dir is also re-exported for external consumers.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All existing `guardkit init` tests pass unchanged.
completion_promises.evidence: All 102 tests in test_init.py pass (0 failed). All 25 tests in test_init_extends.py pass. All 18 tests in test_system_seeding.py pass. All tests in test_init_llm_health.py, test_init_mcp.py, test_init_progress.py, and test_init_exports.py pass. No existing test file was modified. Total: 231 tests passed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: No behavioural change — this is a pure extract-and-rename.
completion_promises.evidence: The extracted resolve_template_source_dir function has identical logic to the original _resolve_template_source_dir. The wrapper in init.py reproduces the same behaviour using the same imported helpers. system_seeding.py continues importing via guardkit.cli.init to maintain existing mock compatibility. All 231 tests pass, confirming zero behavioural change.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran ruff check and ruff format --check on all new/modified files (resolver.py, __init__.py, test_resolver.py). All checks passed with zero errors. Pre-existing F541 warnings in init.py were not introduced by this change and remain unchanged.
